RESPONSIVE DECLARATION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OR NOTICE OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER AREVALO, JOEL

DAVID YOUNGSMITH WITH PETITIONER. HELEN LEON WITH RESPONDENT. COUNSEL PLACED ON CONFERENCE STATUS. PARTIES RETURNED FROM MEET & CONFER WITHOUT AN AGREEMENT. AFTER ARGUMENT & SUBMISSION, THE COURT DENIED RESPONDENT'S REQUEST ON THE CS ISSUE. FURTHERMORE, THE AUTOMOBILE PETITIONER GAVE HIS DAUGHTER IS DEEMED A GIFT, AND DOES NOT CONSTITUTE CS PAYMENTS. REQUESTS FOR AF & SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. PETITIONER OWES CS FROM MAY, 2001 THROUGH MAY, 2002. PRIOR ORDER RE: $285.00 IN AF IS VALID. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797.
